function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-10-28
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-10-28                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

next_step.current_state: First OCR migration write succeeded. Reactive outbox-writing context appears unrelated (file was finance invoice, not outbox). Proceeding with second requested OCR migration.
next_step.observation: The invoice target file was written successfully with YAML frontmatter plus preserved original body.

purchased_on: 2025-12-28
total_eur: 32
counterparty: Hörnbach Österreich
project: Repair Ledger
related_entity: Petra Novak
lines:
  - item: faucet cartridge
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 24
  - item: seal set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Kitchen faucet repair parts

## Line Items

## Notes

Exactly the kind of household fix that becomes folklore unless Miles captures the receipt and part numbers.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request and completed OCR/frontmatter migration for both specified finance records. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each file using visible data from the note and preserved each original body verbatim below the frontmatter. Then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system, read applicable workflow+schema docs, preserved original record bodies exactly during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox note requested OCR workflow on two finance files. The finance schema defined required invoice/bill fields; both source notes contained all required visible values and line items. Both files were updated accordingly with verbatim body preservation, satisfying OCR/migration rules, and the processed inbox request was deleted as required by inbox-processing-v2-update and process-next-inbox-item workflows.
